Title: Joint Optimization of Resource Allocation and Request Batching for Multi-Tenant Inference Serving on GPU
Venue: IEEE Transactions on Parallel and Distributed Systems
Key Contribution: Jointly optimizes resource allocation + batching via DRS (deep RL)
Gap It Leaves: Doesn't address LLM-specific KV-cache growth during generation
Relevance to Our Angle: Base paper - our project specializes this for LLM/KV-cache case

Title: iGniter: Interference-Aware GPU Resource Provisioning for Predictable DNN Inference in the Cloud
Authors: Xu, Xu, Chen, Chen, Shang, Zhou, Liu
Venue: IEEE Transactions on Parallel and Distributed Systems
Key Contribution: Interference-aware GPU resource provisioning for predictable inference
Gap It Leaves: Not LLM-specific; static provisioning, not live memory-adaptive

Title: Horus: Interference-Aware and Prediction-Based Scheduling in Deep Learning Systems
Authors: Yeung, Borowiec, Yang, Friday, Harper, Garraghan
Venue: IEEE Transactions on Parallel and Distributed Systems
Key Contribution: Predicts GPU utilization ahead of time for co-location decisions
Gap It Leaves: Not LLM-specific; prediction is coarse-grained, not per-token

Title: InSS: An Intelligent Scheduling Orchestrator for Multi-GPU Inference With Spatio-Temporal Sharing
Venue: IEEE Transactions on Parallel and Distributed Systems
Key Contribution: Joint placement + resource allocation + batch size across multiple GPUs
Gap It Leaves: General DNN inference, not LLM KV-cache-aware
Relevance to Our Angle: Closest cousin to our project among the 5 refs

Title: A Stochastic Approach for Scheduling AI Training Jobs in GPU-Based Systems
Key Contribution: Cloud-provider-perspective GPU job scheduling under constraints

Title: Gemini: Enabling Multi-Tenant GPU Sharing Based on Kernel Burst Estimation
Relevance to Our Angle: Underlying mechanism for 'second worker on same GPU' idea

Title: Efficient Memory Management for Large Language Model Serving with PagedAttention
Authors: Kwon, Li, Zhuang, Sheng, Zheng, Yu, Gonzalez, Zhang, Stoica
Key Contribution: Non-contiguous KV-cache paging, cuts fragmentation to <4%
Relevance to Our Angle: Foundational context - not for jury citation list

Title: vAttention: Dynamic Memory Management for Serving LLMs without PagedAttention
Key Contribution: Contiguous virtual memory + CUDA demand paging
Gap It Leaves: Still single-GPU; doesn't address cluster scheduling

Title: Orca: A Distributed Serving System for Transformer-Based Generative Models
Splitwise: Efficient Generative LLM Inference Using Phase Splitting
DistServe: Disaggregating Prefill and Decoding for Goodput-Optimized LLM Serving
